title: Hama's Standalone Featherclient
description:
A standalone Feather client mod pack designed for pvp.
- hamabost
body:
Designed to bring pvp performance with minimal mod clutter. Highly reccomend to use with Prism Launcher https://prismlauncher.org/ 

What you can expect from this pack.
- 1.5 to 2x fps dependant on setup/gpu.
- niche mods that you need to dig to find.
- A few of my perferred Optimized PvP resource packs.
- A lightweight easy to configure experience.
- 2 optimized Hud profile codes for feather.

Huds:
- Less cluttered hud : biqtwrlq 
- Basic hud: siacmkwv

If you happen to downgrade the version of the mods:
- Nvidium Github beta (for older/newer versions) 
https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium/releases/tag/0.4.1-beta9
 (0.4.1-beta9 has majority of 1.21 versions).

Do plan to release my Prisim Launcher Pack in the future. <3
